parsed_review.summary: CP00-226 is a clean, descriptor-only continuation of the RP06 DMS-core sequence covering the planned 10 units (RP06.P07.M05.S21–RP06.P07.M06.S05): the M05 Permission And Audit Binding tail (Claude edge-case prompt, human escalation note, closeout handoff, no-silent-success and no-data-leak checks) and the M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head (failure taxonomy + missing tenant/actor/Matter/resource failures). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the implementation supports the production_ready_candidate claim and that production_ready is correctly NOT yet asserted (manifest status implemented_pending_review, production_ready:false). Verified: pack binding (risk A, 10 units, range, upstream CP00-225 / next CP00-227); all 7 required public exports present in service.js/validators.js and re-exported via index.js wildcard; descriptor/case-set functions are pure (no DB, network, object storage, runtime dispatch, state writes, lock/rollback/retry, AI or Hermes runtime); no-leak guards and no-write attestation chain (CP226←CP225←…←CP198) carry promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false; contract JSON current_pack and failure_audit_tail_descriptor updated; validate-rp06 script, README #cp00-226, and node:test assertions are substantive; upstream descriptor name (DmsCoreCp225FailureBindingSliceDescriptor) matches the chain assertion; and all 28 prior-pack validators include CP00-226 in their current_pack allow-lists (spot-checked CP198/210/215/220/225). Cursor is correct: next-pack-queue live_latest_pack_id CP00-225 matches the latest Close commit and CP00-226 is the queue head with no divergence. Review pipeline integrity holds: auth preflight passed with valid JSON, validation-report shows read-only tools only with no forbidden tools and prompt within size limits. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer (not final approver) and Hermes patterns appear only as deterministic evidence-packet descriptors, not product runtime. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. This verdict is independent read-only review evidence only; human final approval remains required for any enterprise-trust claim and post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, normalized receipt) must still be produced before commit.
